description: An aerodynamicist needs to characterize the aerodynamic performance of the eCRM-001 research wing-body configuration to support a design review. The eCRM-001 model is at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Using the aerodynamic analysis tools available in OpenVSP, generate a drag polar covering a representative angle-of-attack range at a relevant subsonic cruise condition. From the results, determine the angle of attack that produces the maximum lift-to-drag ratio. Write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/vspaero_report.txt that documents the aerodynamic performance data and identifies the operating point of maximum L/D.
